creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
This adjust patches to use merged commits with upstream and 2e79d4c902abf3e6bb4ad1b5bf779c0cc22a6fd0 to fix build with FFmpeg 6

Poduriere testport OK, 13.2-RELEASE (amd64)
